title: MegaverseMons
description: This addon datapack for Cobblemon is a collaborative work between me, CrystalizedSun, and others based on the work of a project titled Pokémon Megaverse. Contains frequently updated Fakemon from the project.
body:
This addon datapack for Cobblemon is a collaborative work between me, CrystalizedSun, and others based on the work of a project titled Pokémon Megaverse. It contains Original Fakemon, Regional Forms, and Convergent/Ecologically Similar Species, mostly based on various characters from different franchises.

### Pokémon Included
- Stoake line
> 
> Stoake - Fire
> 
> Magmink - Fire
> 
> Volcarine - Fire/Demon (Adapted to Fire/Dark)
> 
- Babeau and Babette lines (except Snippor for now)
> 
> Babeau - Normal
> 
> Karatage - Normal/Fighting
> 
> > Fratzkian Karatage - Cosmic/Fighting
> Yandement - Normal/Dark
> 
> > Fratzkian Yandement - Cosmic/Steel
> 
> Glideau - Flying/Fairy
> 
> Babette - Fairy
> 
> Sailine - Fairy/Fighting
> 
> > Fratzkian Sailine - Cosmic/Fairy
> 
> Yanditrix - Fairy/Dark
> 
> > Fratzkian Yanditrix - Cosmic/Light
> 
> Cryomette - Ice/Fairy
> 
> Oniette - Ghost/Fairy
> 
- Linernel line (and its Valhansian variant)
> 
> Linernel (and the Valhansian Form) - Normal
> 
> Debiave - Psychic
> 
> Ubunitual - Psychic/Fire
> 
> Gentone - Fairy
> 
> Sabylon - Fairy/Dark
> 
> Doshell - Cyber (Adapted to Digital)
> 
> Windoware - Cyber/Plasma (Adapted to Digital/Electric)
> 
> Darshell - Grass
> 
> Machintech - Grass/Cosmic
> 
- Xylobone and Dethmantle
> 
> Xylobone - Dark
> 
> Dethmantle - Dark/Ground
> 
- Appladoo and Ringousine (Convergent Pumpkaboo and Gourgeist based on apples)
>
> Appladoo - Psychic/Grass
> 
> Ringousine - Psychic/Grass
> 
- Valhansian Buizel and Floatzel
> 
> Valhansian Buizel - Water/Fighting
> 
> Valhansian Floatzel - Water/Fighting
> 
- Hoennian Obstagoon
> 
> Hoennian Obstagoon - Fighting/Normal
> 
- Pixight line
> 
> Pixight - Fairy/Light
> 
> Luminix - Fairy/Light
> 
> Sparkless - Fairy/Light
> 
- Manixie
> 
> Manixie - Fairy
> 
> Mystical Manixie - Fairy/Psychic
> 
- Liength
> 
> Liength - Fighting
> 
- Soaring Kite (Past Paradox Glideau)
> 
> Soaring Kite - Grass/Flying
> 
- Sprite Pixel (Future Paradox Manixie)
> 
> Sprite Pixel - Cyber/Fairy (Adapted to Digital/Fairy)
> 
- Auroncer (and its Agarsian variant)
> 
> Auroncer - Fire/Ice
> 
> Agarsian Auroncer - Grass/Light
>
